zh.Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England: 英國格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Berkeley 5th Baron Berkeley於1353年1月5日出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊時，他的父親Maurice de Berkeley 4th Baron Berkeley23歲，母親Elizabeth le Despenser Baroness Berkeley26歲。他於大約1380年與Margaret de Lisle 3rd Baroness Lisle結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1417年7月13日在英國格盧斯特斯爾度斯利享年64歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特武德內斯波洛聖 瑪麗 馮 維金 亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Berkeley 5th Baron Berkeley于1353年1月5日出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊时，他的父亲Maurice de Berkeley 4th Baron Berkeley23岁，母亲Elizabeth le Despenser Baroness Berkeley26岁。他于大约1380年与Margaret de Lisle 3rd Baroness Lisle结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1417年7月13日在英国格盧斯特斯爾度斯利享年64岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特武德內斯波洛聖 瑪麗 馮 維金 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Berkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Barclay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Berkley
meanings: English: variant of   Berkeley  . Compare Scottish   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Berkeley 5th Baron Berkeley was born on 5 January 1353, in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Maurice de Berkeley 4th Baron Berkeley, was 23 and his mother, Elizabeth le Despenser Baroness Berkeley, was 26. He married Margaret de Lisle 3rd Baroness Lisle about 1380. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 13 July 1417, in Dursley, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 64, and was buried in St. Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Woodnesborough, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Berkeley 5th Baron Berkeley est né le 5 janvier 1353, à Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Maurice de Berkeley 4th Baron Berkeley, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth le Despenser Baroness Berkeley, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Lisle 3rd Baroness Lisle environ 1380. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 13 juillet 1417, à Dursley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à St. Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Woodnesborough, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Berkeley 5th Baron Berkeley am 5. Januar 1353 in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Maurice de Berkeley 4th Baron Berkeley 23 und seine Mutter Elizabeth le Despenser Baroness Berkeley 26. Er hat um 1380 Margaret de Lisle 3rd Baroness Lisle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 13. Juli 1417 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Dursley, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in St. Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Woodnesborough, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Berkeley 5th Baron Berkeley è nato il il 5 gennaio 1353 nel Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Maurice de Berkeley 4th Baron Berkeley, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth le Despenser Baroness Berkeley, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Lisle 3rd Baroness Lisle circa 1380. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 13 luglio 1417, nel Dursley, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a St. Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Woodnesborough, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Berkeley 5th Baron Berkeleyが1353年1月5日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバーケリーで生まれた時，父Maurice de Berkeley 4th Baron Berkeleyは23歳，母Elizabeth le Despenser Baroness Berkeleyは26歳であった。約1380年にMargaret de Lisle 3rd Baroness Lisleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1417年7月13日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアダルスリーで64歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントウッドネスボロウスト. マリー ス バージン チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Wotton: 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 우드네스버루그h 스트. 메리 테 버긴 c후르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Berkeley 5th Baron Berkeley(이)가 1353년 1월 5일 영국 그루스스터실르 버켈리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Maurice de Berkeley 4th Baron Berkeley(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth le Despenser Baroness Berkeley(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1380년 Margaret de Lisle 3rd Baroness Lisle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1417년 7월 13일 영국 그루스스터실르 뒤르슬리에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 우드네스버루그h 스트. 메리 테 버긴 c후르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

pt.Saint Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Wotton: St. Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Woodnesborough, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Berkeley 5th Baron Berkeley nasceu em 5 de janeiro de 1353, em Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Maurice de Berkeley 4th Baron Berkeley, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth le Despenser Baroness Berkeley, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Lisle 3rd Baroness Lisle aproximadamente 1380. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 13 de julho de 1417, em Dursley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em St. Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Woodnesborough, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Saint Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Wotton: ст. мэри т виргин чурчярд, вуднесбороую, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Berkeley 5th Baron Berkeley родился 5 января 1353 г. в местности биркели, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Maurice de Berkeley 4th Baron Berkeley было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth le Despenser Baroness Berkeley, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Lisle 3rd Baroness Lisle около 1380 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 13 июля 1417 г. в местности дурсли, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности ст. мэри т виргин чурчярд, вуднесбороую, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de Berkeley 5th Baron Berkeley nació el 5 de enero de 1353, en Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Maurice de Berkeley 4th Baron Berkeley, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Elizabeth le Despenser Baroness Berkeley, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Margaret de Lisle 3rd Baroness Lisle aproximadamente 1380. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 13 de julio de 1417, en Dursley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en St. Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Woodnesborough, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
